data.text/markdown:
2020 Census Reference Builder (County + State) Purpose: Build a single CSV combining county and state reference data with readable FIPS codes and descriptive classifications. Safe to modify:
  • URLs (if Census publishes new versions)
  • Output file name
  • Add additional derived fields
